title: aspidium puberulum
intro: Aspidium puberulum, also known as the "Velvet Lady Fern", is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aspidium puberulum include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and burns. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
